arts.ttl: 5 reasons Bayern will beat Paris Saint-Germain in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: Since that night, the German record champions have not suffered defeat in any of their next 32 home fixtures at this stage of the competition, including two victories in this year’s campaign, in which they thrashed Dinamo Zagreb 9-2 and eventually overcame Benfica . Vincent Kompany's side got back to winning ways last time out in the Champions League, winning 1-0 at home to Benfica and bringing their overall record in this year’s competition to two wins and two defeats.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Paris Saint-German: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Harry Kane's latest hat-trick for Bayern bodes well if the Bundesliga leaders can take their domestic form into the UEFA Champions League with a big three points at stake at home to Paris Saint-German this Tuesday (kick-off: 9pm CET). A record 9-2 win over Dinamo Zagreb on Matchday 1 sent out warnings to the rest of Europe, but back-to-back defeats away at Aston Villa and then Barcelona left Bayern languishing in the early league phase.

arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been closely monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich in recent months, with reports from Germany suggesting a move nearly took place this past summer. As the January transfer window approaches, new developments have emerged regarding the potential move. The Ligue 1 side aren’t the only club targeting Kimmich, though. arts.ttl: Why Harry Kane Represents PSG’s Biggest Threat Against Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain desperately need a win in the UEFA Champions League on Tuesday when they travel to Bayern Munich’s Allianz Arena. Moreover, one pundit believes that the Ligue 1 side will need to do everything to contain Harry Kane. The Parisians are coming off a 2-1 defeat to Atlético de Madrid, which has seriously jeopardized […] The post Why Harry Kane Represents PSG’s Biggest Threat Against Bayern Munich appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Barça to PSG was never the plan for Neymar, says father
arts.sum: Neymar is currently injured and hoping to recover in time to play in the new FIFA Club World Cup. His contract runs until 2025, and his father spoke about his future on the Roundcast podcast. PSG was never the Neymar plan

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Real Madrid to make shock play for Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane and Bayer Leverkusen’s Jonathan Tah in 2025?; Manchester United lasered in on Viktor Gyökeres; FC Barcelona talks with Ronald Araújo are stalled; and MORE!
arts.sum: Kane was linked to Real Madrid before his eventual move to Bayern Munich, but barring some kind of miraculous change of direction for his career, it seems like the striker will be headed home to England for his next club. Real Madrid are reportedly eyeing a potential move for Bayern Munich’s star forward, Harry Kane, according to a recent update from Fichajes.

arts.ttl: Man Utd, West Ham on Alert as PSG Still Keen on £60M-Rated Star
arts.sum: In the final days of the summer transfer window, Paris Saint-Germain showed interest in Atalanta forward Ademola Lookman. A new report reveals that the Ligue 1 side remain keen on the Nigerian standout despite not landing him a few months ago.
